title: M.Y 2.3m Wooden Skipping Rope | Skipping Rope For Kids and Adults | Fitness
features: Vintage style. This skipping rope is designed with classic wooden handles to give it an old look, but with modern quality
Outdoor adventures. Have fun and stay active, skipping rope is an excellent way to improve overall fitness and can also be a lot of fun
Play Together Get a few friends and play classic rope hopping games or invent your own rope bouncing lilies.
Length of skipping rope: approx. 2.3 metres
description: From the brand M.Y UK based brand working with KandyToys Ltd to provide quality products including toys, beach & sport accessories and gifts for all ages.
